display.name: Raymarch Sphere
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Mandelbox-fold sphere SDF with cyan rim light; mid-band audio modulates iteration.

annotation.technical_notes: A raymarched signed distance field (SDF) utilizes spatial domain repetition to create a tiled grid of geometric, capsule-like columns in the style of Inigo Quilez. The camera's forward translation and shape morphing are driven by the synthetic test signal, while a sudden full-frame flash indicates a beat-gated threshold trigger. Shading is computed via a custom cosine palette with clean diffuse lighting.
